[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person stands in an outdoor courtyard under a metal awning, facing away from the camera toward a white wall and a closed set of vertical metal bars.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a person wearing a patterned cap and a black outfit, standing with their arms relaxed at their sides and their back to the camera. The person wears black pants and black-and-white slip-on shoes, and a black t-shirt with large white text and smaller red and white graphic elements on the back.

Setting:
The scene appears to be outside, in a narrow paved area between two white walls or building fronts. Above, a dark metal roof or awning with rectangular openings spans the top of the frame. On the left side there is a recessed opening with vertical metal bars, and on the right side there are tall vertical bars attached to a gate or door. The lighting is bright and high-contrast, creating strong shadows and a washed, monochrome look.

Visual Details:
The person is centered in the frame and photographed from behind. The black t-shirt shows prominent white lettering across the upper back, with additional smaller text and a red rectangular element near the shoulder area; the exact wording is partially unclear but “NO MERCY” is visible in large white letters. The cap has a dark base with a spotted or camo-like pattern. The ground is uneven and dusty, with visible stains and dark patches along the concrete edges. The left wall has a small ledge or step, and a dark base area where the wall meets the ground.

Visible Text:
NO MERCY
(The smaller text on the shirt is unclear. No other clearly readable text is detected.)

Practical Summary:
A person stands facing away from the camera in a narrow outdoor space beside barred openings. They wear a patterned cap and a black t-shirt with large white text on the back.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
